summary: V1.3 Page Assessment fully verified end-to-end. Backend pytest 60/60 PASS (12 new test_page_assessment.py + 48 prior). Live POST /api/audit on https://example.com/ returns the new `page_assessment` block with the full contract (page_type, page_type_label, page_type_signals, fit, fit_label, fit_score, fit_breakdown{title,h1,url,h2,content}, recommendation, rationale). Live GET /api/audits/77253f93-... returns the persisted golden hub assessment (page_type='hub', fit='strong', fit_score=77, recommendation matches canonical hub-with-subtopics string). All three exports (md/txt/pdf) return 200 with correct Content-Type and md/txt include the 'Page Assessment' section near the top. Frontend Playwright smoke on /audits/{id}: data-testid='page-assessment' renders BEFORE 'Area scores' h2 (DOM-ordered), assessment-page-type shows 'Hub Page', assessment-fit shows 'Strong Fit 77 / 100', assessment-recommendation matches the golden string exactly, assessment-signals UL has 3 LI items, fit_breakdown UL renders title/h1/url/h2/content. Re-analyse button present, Export dropdown opens with export-pdf/export-md/export-txt all present. Homepage Recent audits list still loads. No regressions.

verified_contract_items.post_audit_page_assessment_top_level_fie: PRESENT on live https://example.com audit (id=48f3d303-a26b-46f8-ba7c-624cf6960b01) — all 9 contract keys present, page_type='landing', fit='moderate', fit_score=62
verified_contract_items.fit_breakdown_keys: title, h1, url, h2, content — all 5 present
verified_contract_items.golden_hub_persisted: GET /api/audits/77253f93-6763-459f-84f6-8f625c7ebc83 → page_type=hub, fit=strong, fit_score=77, recommendation='Keep as a hub page and consider creating dedicated landing pages for the most important subtopics.' (exact string match)
verified_contract_items.export_md_status_and_section: 200 text/markdown; charset=utf-8 — contains '## Page Assessment', 'Hub Page', 'Strong Fit (77/100)', canonical recommendation string
verified_contract_items.export_txt_status_and_section: 200 text/plain; charset=utf-8 — contains 'PAGE ASSESSMENT', 'Page type : Hub Page', 'Phrase fit : Strong Fit (77/100)', recommendation string
verified_contract_items.export_pdf_status: 200 application/pdf — render_pdf() includes Page Assessment paragraph block at audit/report.py:288-290 (verified by code inspection; pytest test_pdf_contract also asserts content)
verified_contract_items.frontend_assessment_above_area_scores: DOM order verified via compareDocumentPosition → assessment precedes 'Area scores' h2 (pos=4 = FOLLOWING)
verified_contract_items.frontend_testids_present: page-assessment, assessment-page-type ('Hub Page'), assessment-fit ('Strong Fit\n77 / 100'), assessment-recommendation (full canonical string), assessment-signals (3 LI), assessment-fit-breakdown (title/h1/url/h2/content rows)
verified_contract_items.no_regression_export_menu: export-btn opens export-menu-pop; export-pdf/export-md/export-txt all present
verified_contract_items.no_regression_homepage: Recent audits list at / still loads (Open buttons visible for prior audits)

critical_code_review_comments: audit/scorer.py is still ~673 LOC (carried over from V1.2) — splitting into per-area modules remains a future refactor (not introduced/worsened by V1.3).

AssessmentCard recommendation text can visually pass under the Export popover at narrow widths (the popover sits to the right of the score ring and overlaps the rec on smaller viewports). Not a functional bug — text is still readable when popover is closed; consider a z-index/positioning tweak for the popover or moving the rec onto its own row below the header.

Frontend currently relies on `a.page_type_signals?.length > 0` to render the signals UL — if backend ever returns an empty list, the UL is not rendered. Backend currently always emits ≥1 signal for landing/category/hub so this is consistent; just worth documenting that the test requirement 'UL with at least one LI when signals exist' is satisfied conditionally (UL is absent when signals=[], which is the correct behaviour).

audit/report.py PDF block uses reportlab Paragraph — verified path exists and contract test passes. PDF text extraction via standard python pypdf/PyPDF2 not available in container, but reportlab-generated content was confirmed via code inspection at report.py:287-290.

No automated frontend test currently asserts that the score ring is de-emphasised relative to the assessment card (PRD says 'score is now secondary'). Functionally fine — assessment sits above, score remains in header — but a screenshot-based design lint could be added in a future iteration.
seed_data_creation: One live audit created via POST /api/audit for https://example.com/ (id=48f3d303-a26b-46f8-ba7c-624cf6960b01) — used for live contract verification. Golden hub audit id=77253f93-6763-459f-84f6-8f625c7ebc83 was pre-existing and was used for both GET-persistence and frontend smoke.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V1.3 Page Assessment is GREEN end-to-end. The 12 new tests in /app/backend/tests/test_page_assessment.py cover the 5 canonical recommendation strings plus the 'Phrase and page are already well aligned.' edge case for landing-strong-≥90. Frontend testids to keep stable: page-assessment, assessment-page-type, assessment-fit, assessment-recommendation, assessment-signals, assessment-fit-breakdown. Golden hub audit id (77253f93-6763-459f-84f6-8f625c7ebc83) is a stable smoke target — page_type=hub, fit_score=77. If scorer.py or assessment.py change, re-run the full suite + the frontend Playwright snippet from this iteration. If audit/models.py changes the PageAssessment shape, the frontend AssessmentCard at /app/frontend/src/pages/AuditResult.jsx:28-78 must be updated in lockstep.
